versions.version_description: The original seems to be in G# so I changed it to A. Chords in other versions don't sound right to me, too many chords, so I have shown how I play it.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
All Through The Night

Written by Jules Shear
Arrangements by Cyndi Lauper, Rick Chertoff, Rob Hyman, Eric Bazilian
Preformed by Cyndi Lauper as released on the album 'She's So Unusual'
Transcribed/sent by Douglas Bowlby

Capo: 1st fret

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
All through the night[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be awake and I'll be with you[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
All through the night[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]G[/ch]
This precious time when time is new[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em/G[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, all through the night today[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Knowing that we feel the same without saying[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em/G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
We have no past we won't reach back[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Keep with me forward all through the night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em/G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
And once we start the meter clicks[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
And it goes running all through the night[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em/G[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Until it ends there is no end[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
All through the night[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]G[/ch]
stray cat is crying so stray cat sings back[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
All through the night[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]G[/ch]
They have forgotten what by day they lack[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em/G[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh under those white street lamps[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
There is a little chance they may see[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em/G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
We have no past we won't reach back[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Keep with me forward all through the night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em/G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
And once we start the meter clicks[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
And it goes running all through the night[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em/G[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Until it ends there is no end[/tab]

[Instrumental] 
[ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em/G[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh the sleep in your eyes is enough[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Let me be there let me stay there awhile[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em/G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
We have no past we won't reach back[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Keep with me forward all through the night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em/G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
And once we start the meter clicks[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
And it goes running all through the night[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em/G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Until it ends there is no end[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Keep with me forward all through the night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em/G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
And once we start the meter clicks[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
And it goes running all through the night[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em/G[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Until it ends there is no end[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
